title: Remove all non-SPDX comments; enforce Zephyr style and Kconfig MAX sizes in coap_status.c, coap_dtn.c, coap_status.h
description: Strip all explanatory comments (keep only SPDX). Ensure all MAX sizes come from CONFIG_*. Update coap_dtn.c for any similar CBOR/zcbor capacity issues or snprintf. Match previous CCP-17 style from da2q.17.3.
